title: Windows 2022 Server on Azure - PodMan Fails to Run
body:
### Issue Description

When I install podman on windows 2022 it fails under init.

```
Extracting compressed file
Importing operating system into WSL (this may take a few minutes on a new WSL install)...
Import in progress, this may take a few minutes.
There are no more endpoints available from the endpoint mapper.
Error code: Wsl/Service/CreateVm/ConfigureNetworking/0x800706d9
Error: the WSL import of guest OS failed: exit status 0xffffffff
```

This is actually an issue with WSL as a plain WSL run also fails:

WslRegisterDistribution failed with error: 0x800706d9
Error: 0x800706d9 There are no more endpoints available from the endpoint mapper.

However if I install rancher desktop, do not run it and then run podman all is ok. I have no ideas why docker or rancher desktop fix the issue.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a windows server 2022 on Azure 
2. Enable Hyper V and WSL2 features using the following then restart
 ```
Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName Microsoft-Hyper-V -NoRestart;
Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux -NoRestart
```
3. Install podman 
4. Run podman machine init


### Describe the results you received

There are no more endpoints available from the endpoint mapper.
Error code: Wsl/Service/CreateVm/ConfigureNetworking/0x800706d9
Error: the WSL import of guest OS failed: exit status 0xffffffff

### Describe the results you expected

To have worked

### podman info output

```yaml
I cannot run podman info as I cannot run the init
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
Looking further this seems to be an issue with WSL that is logged here: https://github.com/microsoft/WSL/issues/9258

It is particularly around nested virtualisation. I will close this issue but leave it here if others have the same issue,
